name: agent-ready
description: The agent-ready methodology: audit an existing codebase, make it safe and clear, then resolve the backlog with autonomous agents on the tractable subset and human pairing on the rest.

plugins.name: agent-ready
plugins.description: Skills that bootstrap a repo for agent work, install the methodology docs, scaffold area audits, and resolve issues autonomously or in pair-mode.

plugins.name: agent-ready-guardrails
plugins.description: A safe deny/ask/allow baseline for handing a repo to agents: destructive git/filesystem actions denied, production access gated behind approval, secrets protected. Ships a PreToolUse guard that blocks the catastrophic subset on enable.
